description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a prominent circular opening or vent at the center of the roof. The exterior features a combination of metallic and blue panels, with visible framework and structural supports at the corners. The front side appears to have a service counter or window, likely for customer interaction, flanked by smaller panels and possible signage. The sides and rear are more utilitarian, with less ornamentation and additional support elements. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on accessibility. The kiosk is elevated slightly above the ground, suggesting a sturdy base or platform.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a flat roof, metallic and blue paneling, and a central circular roof feature. The front includes a service counter or window for customer interaction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the service counter or window, blue and metallic panels, and the central circular roof feature.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the structural supports and the depth of the kiosk, with the circular roof feature visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal detailing, showing the back panel and the circular roof feature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with visible supports and the central roof feature.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign above the service window, integrated into the front panel, no visible text
attribute_window_presence: one large service window at the front, rectangular
attribute_door_configuration: single door at the rear, standard type
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with a central circular vent or skylight, metallic finish
